chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1740 of 2024 C.P.No.D-2574 of 2024 C.P.No.D-5848 of 2024 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ C.P.No.D-1740 of 2024 1.For hearing of Misc.No.7870/2024 2.For hearing of main case. C.P.No.D-2574 of 2024 1.For hearing of Misc.No.11712/2024 2.For hearing of main case. C.P.No.D-5848 of 2024 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA No.25915/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 19-12-2024. M/s.Adeel Awan and Imran Iqbal, Advocates for the Petitioners. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) --- Admittedly, the petitioners have filed appeal before the statutory Form in respect of subject matter, therefore, in view of hereof, these petitions have become infructuous. These petitions are dismissed as infructuous. The petitioners are at liberty to seek remedy in accordance with law. Judge Judge nasir
